name: learning-opportunities-auto
description: Automatically nudges Codex to offer learning exercises after git commits. Requires the learning-opportunities plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Nudges learning exercise offers after commits
interface.longDescription: Adds a post-tool-use hook that notices git commits and reminds Codex to consider offering a short learning exercise through the learning-opportunities skill.
defaultPrompt: Offer learning exercises automatically after commits
